segments.text: Some elders of Israel arrived and sat down with me.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: A message from the Lord came to me, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Son of man, these men are worshiping idols in their minds even though they know this will lead them to sin. Why should I respond to their requests?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So tell them that this is what the Lord God says: When the people of Israel worship idols in their minds that will lead them to sin, and then come to consult the prophet, I the Lord will give them an answer appropriate to their many idols.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Like this I might have the people of Israel decide to recommit themselves to me. Right now, because of their idols, all of them treat me as their enemy.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So tell the people of Israel that this is what the Lord God says: Repent! Give up worshiping your idols Stop all your disgusting practices.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When the people of Israel or foreigners living with them worship idols in their minds that will lead them to sin and then come to consult the prophet, I the Lord will answer them myself.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will oppose anyone who does this and make any example of them that others will talk about. I will remove them from among my people. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But if the prophet is deceived into giving a message, it was I the Lord who deceived him to do this. I will still reach out and destroy that prophet from my people Israel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will be responsible for the punishment they receive, along with those who consult such prophets. They will receive the same punishment.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This is so that the people of Israel won't abandon me anymore and won't make themselves unclean with all their sins. Then they will be my people and I will be their God, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: A message from the Lord came to me again, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Son of man, if a people in a country sin against me by being unfaithful to me, then I will act against them by cutting off their food supply, so they experience famine, with no food for people or animals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Even if Noah, Daniel, and Job, these three men, were present their good lives would only save themselves, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I could send wild animals rampaging through the country, so they would leave it uninhabited and desolate, a place no one would travel through for fear of such animals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As I live, declares the Lord God, even if these three men were present, they couldn't save their own sons or daughters. They would only save themselves, but the land would be left desolate.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I could bring war to that country and say, ‘Have a sword cut through it,’ so that I destroy both people and animals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As I live, declares the Lord God, even if these three men were present, they couldn't save their own sons or daughters. They would only save themselves.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I could send a disease on that country and because of my anger I would kill many, both people and animals.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As I live, declares the Lord God, even if Noah, Daniel, and Job were present, they couldn't save their sons or daughters. Their good lives would only save themselves.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This is what the Lord God says: It will be so much worse when I send my four severe judgments against Jerusalem—war, famine, wild animals, and disease, so that both people and animals are killed!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Even so a few of them will survive, some sons and daughters who will be taken captive. They will be brought to you in Babylon, [^33] and when you realize what they did and how they acted, you will understand why I had to bring such a disaster down on Jerusalem—everything I did to it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Realizing what they did and how they acted will help you to see that I had good reasons to do everything I did to Jerusalem, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: The LORD
